cases.question: What is total completed revenue?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE status='completed'

cases.question: How many completed orders are there?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status='completed'

cases.question: How many distinct customers placed a completed order?
cases.analyst_query: select count(distinct user_id) from orders where status='completed'

cases.question: What is our membership retention rate?
cases.analyst_query: select round(100.0 * count_if(status='active') / count(*), 1) as retention_rate_pct from memberships where plan_type in ('plus_monthly','plus_annual')

cases.question: What is the order cancellation rate?
What share of sessions resulted in a purchase?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='purchase_complete' THEN session_id END) / COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS purchase_session_share FROM events

cases.question: What is total line-item revenue (sum of line_total) for completed orders?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT SUM(oi.line_total) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed'

cases.question: What is average completed revenue per customer?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT SUM(total_amount)/COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders WHERE status='completed'

cases.question: What was completed revenue on holidays?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM orders o JOIN calendar c ON o.order_date = c.date WHERE o.status='completed' AND c.is_holiday = TRUE

cases.question: What is the membership trial-to-paid conversion rate?
cases.analyst_query: select round(100.0 * count_if(status='converted') / count(*), 2) as trial_to_paid_pct from memberships where plan_type='plus_trial'

cases.question: What is the checkout conversion rate?
cases.analyst_query: select round(100.0*count(distinct case when started and purchased then session_id end)/nullif(count(distinct case when started then session_id end),0),2) as checkout_conv_rate from (select session_id, max(case when event_type='checkout_started' then 1 else 0 end)=1 as started, max(case when event_type='purchase_complete' then 1 else 0 end)=1 as purchased from events group by session_id)

cases.question: What is the NPS (net promoter score)?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN score <= 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) / COUNT(*), 2) AS nps FROM nps_responses

cases.question: How many monthly active users were there in December 2024?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM events WHERE event_date >= '2024-12-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01'

cases.question: What is the total product cost (COGS) for completed orders?
cases.analyst_query: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * p.cost) AS total_cogs FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed'
